notifications.title: Email notification preferences
notifications.subtitle: Choose which emails CarbonTrack should send you. Updates take effect immediately.
notifications.emailDescription: Toggle the email notifications you would like to receive. Direct messages and security alerts are always delivered.
notifications.locked: This notification is required and cannot be disabled.

verification.label: Account verification
verification.description: Codes and links required to verify your email address.

security.label: Security alerts
security.description: Password reset links and other important security updates.

system.label: System tips & onboarding
system.description: Welcome guidance and important account announcements.

transaction.label: Point exchanges
transaction.description: Updates about your reward redemptions and exchange status.

activity.label: Activity reviews
activity.description: Results and feedback for your submitted carbon-saving activities.

announcement.label: Announcements
announcement.description: Platform-wide news, maintenance notices, and newsletters.

message.label: Direct messages
message.description: Email copies of messages from other users. Always enabled.

support.label: Ticket updates
support.description: Emails sent when support staff change ticket status, priority, or assignment.

testEmail.title: Send a test email
testEmail.description: We will email a sample notification so you can confirm delivery and spam filter rules.
testEmail.success: A test notification email is on its way to your inbox.
testEmail.error: Unable to send the test email. Please try again later.
